SEARCH
Package jGameLib.ecs.audio

Class BackgroundMusicSystem

java.lang.Object
jGameLib.ecs.JSystem
jGameLib.ecs.audio.BackgroundMusicSystem
public class BackgroundMusicSystem extends JSystem
A utility class to manage background music.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    BackgroundMusicSystem()
    Creates a BackgroundMusicManager, muted by default.

  • Constructor Details

    • BackgroundMusicSystem

      public BackgroundMusicSystem()
      Creates a BackgroundMusicManager, muted by default. You must call unMute() to unMute the music.

      Example usage: 

      
 BackgroundMusicManager m = new BackgroundMusicManager();
 m.useMusic(new Sound("Music.wav"));
 m.unMute();

  • Method Details

    • useMusic

      public void useMusic(@Nullable @Nullable Sound s)
      Stops playing the last Sound used, and starts playing Sound s. If s is null, or if s was the last sound used, this method does nothing.
      Parameters:
      s - The sound to use as the background music. If s is null, this method does nothing.

    • stopMusic

      public void stopMusic()
      Stops the background music entirely. You must call useMusic(Sound) again to start playing music again.

    • mute

      public void mute()
      Mutes the background music. The music keeps advancing while the background music is muted, but no sound is played.

    • unMute

      public void unMute()
      Unmutes the background music (See mute() for more details about what this means).

    • isMuted

      public boolean isMuted()
      Returns:
      Whether the BackgroundMusicManager is muted.

    • setVolume

      public void setVolume(double volume)
      Sets the volume of the background music.
      Parameters:
      volume - A double in the range [0, 1]

    • canActOn

      public boolean canActOn(Entity e)
      Specified by:
      canActOn in class JSystem

    • applyAction

      public void applyAction(Collection<Entity> e, GameState currentState)
      Specified by:
      applyAction in class JSystem
